title: Mob Battle Music
description: Mod that adds background music when fighting hostile mobs and players
body:
![Title image](https://i.imgur.com/VQgTG2b.png)

![About text](https://i.imgur.com/jD7rZaY.png) ### Mob Battle Music adds three new music tracks that play as you sneak about mobs, fight them, and battle players. The mod is completely client side and is not required on the server. ![Features heading](https://i.imgur.com/blM8qzF.png) - Three new music tracks: - **Non-Aggressive**, which plays when no nearby hostile mobs are aggressive/attacking. A "tense" track that acts as the "calm before the storm." - **Aggressive,** which plays when a mob becomes aggressive/starts attacking. - **Player,** which begins when you start attacking another player or they start attacking you. Adds some tension for PvP duels. - Highly customizable with a built-in config menu. - Modify, replace, or add music tracks using [resource packs](https://github.com/nonamecrackers2/mob-battle-music/wiki/Customization). - Completely client side. ![Notes heading](https://i.imgur.com/CLgvayK.png) **This mod was commissioned by TSEG** Currently only for Forge. Considering the simplicity of this mod, a Fabric port may happen. Support for both NeoForge and Forge past 1.20.1 is also very likely. **Please do not ask for backports.** If you encounter any issues, bugs, or have any suggestions, feel free to let me know using the mod's [issue tracker](https://github.com/nonamecrackers2/mob-battle-music/issues). **All music added by this mod is Royalty Free.** Please note that the non-aggressive track used in the mod may be Content ID claimed if detected on YouTube, but you are allowed to use it. Please check out [this link](https://github.com/nonamecrackers2/mob-battle-music/wiki/Credits#:~:text=Note%3A%20This%20track,music/15383/license/) for more info on how to clear it. Feel free to include this mod in any modpack you'd like, however make sure to have a link back to this page. [Credits](https://github.com/nonamecrackers2/mob-battle-music/wiki/Credits) | [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/nonamecrackers2/mob-battle-music/issues) | [Source](https://github.com/nonamecrackers2/mob-battle-music) [![BH Banner](https://i.imgur.com/T8fKJrM.png "BH Banner")](https://bisecthosting.com/nonamecrackers "BH Promo")
